name: Caramel Pear Pudding Cake
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Can pears, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, stir together flour, white sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, salt and cloves.
2. Add milk; beat until smooth.
3. Stir in pears and pecans.
4. Turn into an ungreased 2 quart casserole.
5. In a separate bowl combine brown sugar, butter and boiling water; pour evenly over batter.
6. Bake in a 375 oven for 45 minutes.
7. Serve immediately with ice cream or whipped cream.
